assessment: The implementation fully meets the plan scope. Both diff use cases are implemented: (1) HIL PRD approval shows proposed-diff via GET proposed-diff and ServerDiffView with Approve/Reject on the same screen; (2) Sketch version list shows 'Compare to current' per history entry (when documentVersion is present) and opens a version-diff modal. Backend provides GET /projects/:id/prd/proposed-diff and GET /projects/:id/prd/diff with the specified response shapes and 400/404 handling. SPEC snapshots are persisted on save; diff is computed server-side with shared types; ServerDiffView handles empty/identical diff, 404 with Dismiss/Close, 500-line cap with 'Show more', theme-aware styling, and a11y. Orchestrator blocks work until PRD/SPEC HIL is resolved. Unit and integration tests cover diff helper, endpoints, NotificationService.getById, hasOpenPrdSpecHilApproval, and frontend components. No significant gaps or deviations; optional items (stale-proposal warning, E2E for this feature) were deferred per plan.
